task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into the FreeMED system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or main interface is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the intra-messaging system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A messaging interface, inbox, or 'Compose Message' screen is visible within the FreeMED application.

task_completion.description: Agent selected Nurse Sarah Mitchell (smitchell) as the recipient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Sarah Mitchell' or username 'smitchell' is visible in the 'To' or recipient field of the message composition screen.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct subject line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Lab Results - Maria Santos' (or containing 'Lab Results') is visible in the 'Subject' field.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the required message body regarding the patient's lab results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text containing 'lipid panel is back' and 'Cholesterol is slightly elevated at 210' is visible in the main message body text area.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully sent the internal message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation notification (e.g., 'Message sent'), the message appearing in a 'Sent' folder, or the agent clicking the 'Send' button.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeMED web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeMED web application is visible in a browser window, rather than a text editor or script.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or MySQL client to insert the message directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing `mysql` commands, SQL `INSERT` statements, or database manipulation scripts are visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the internal messaging system, not the clinical progress notes section.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface clearly indicates 'Messages', 'Inbox', or 'Mail' rather than 'Patient Chart', 'EMR', or 'Progress Notes'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The recipient's username is 'smitchell' (Sarah Mitchell). The patient is 'Maria Santos'. The message subject must contain 'Lab Results' and the body must contain 'lipid panel is back'. The message must be sent via the internal messaging system, not recorded as a clinical progress note.
